name: Kleina Kaffee Kuchen (Small Coffe Cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter, sugar, and salt together until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. To the dissolved yeast, add 3 tablespoons of flour and mix thoroughly.
4. Combine this mixture with the first creamed mixture.
5. Gradually add the remaining flour and cream alternately, ensuring all ingredients are well combined.
6. Grease and flour muffin tins, filling them about 2/3 full with the dough.
7. Place the pans in a warm location until the dough has risen to touch the tops of the pans.
8. Bake at 400°F for approximately 25 minutes.
